overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk apartment from Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks from a sunlit living area through a kitchenette with cyan neon lighting, passes through a distinctive green sequined curtain, and enters a compact bathroom. The footage showcases high-fidelity game graphics with dramatic warm sunlight streaming through windows contrasting with cool artificial neon accents.

kitchen counter with various appliances and items

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a cyberpunk apartment living space with warm morning sunlight streaming through a large window revealing a futuristic cityscape. The camera moves forward past a desk area toward a kitchenette featuring cyan neon underlighting and modern appliances. The player interacts with an item on the kitchen counter around the 10-second mark.

events.description: player passes through green sequined curtain into bathroom area

agents.ego_description: turning toward the bathroom entrance and passing through the hanging curtain doorway

entered.detail: decorative curtain made of green reflective circular sequins hanging in doorway
white porcelain sink with faucet and mirror above
wall-mounted shower control panel with multiple buttons and lights

segments.scene_description: The player turns away from the kitchen toward a bathroom entrance marked by a distinctive green sequined curtain. The camera approaches and passes through the curtain, which creates a shimmering visual effect, transitioning from the main living area into a more enclosed bathroom space with different lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: compact bathroom with shower and vanity

events.description: player picks up bounce back mk.1 item from bathroom floor
player interacts with shower control panel on the wall

agents.ego_description: looking around the bathroom interior, examining the shower area, sink, and picking up an item from the floor

entered.detail: white toilet with open lid and beige seat
bathroom mirror with cyan neon light fixture above
white towels hanging on wall-mounted rack
small metallic trash bin on floor

segments.scene_description: Inside the compact bathroom, the camera pans around to reveal a sink with neon-lit mirror, a toilet, and a shower area with a high-tech control panel. The lighting is dimmer and more artificial compared to the main room. The player picks up an item from the floor near the sink and interacts with the shower controls, highlighting the detailed cyberpunk interior design.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sun-drenched cyberpunk living space into the dim, artificial confines of a high-tech bathroom. It begins in a bright apartment where warm morning light streams through a large window, moving past a desk toward a kitchenette defined by cool cyan neon underlighting. As the camera interacts with an item on the counter, it turns away from the kitchen to approach a shimmering green sequined curtain. The scene then shifts as the camera passes through the curtain, transitioning from the open living area into a compact bathroom with dimmer, neon-lit mirrors. Finally, the camera pans across the enclosed space, moving from the sink to a shower area with a high-tech control panel to highlight the detailed interior design.
